# Reference

This site is the **on-ramp**. For full documentation, here is where to go:

## Live, auto-generated

- **[OpenAPI spec](https://elvira.digital/EvilFlowersCatalog/)** — generated
  from the catalog source code via `python manage.py openapi`. The most
  reliable contract reference.

## Curated by the team

- **[Catalog wiki](https://github.com/EvilFlowersCatalog/EvilFlowersCatalog/wiki)** —
  architecture, security, OPDS 2.0, Readium LCP, Thorium setup guide, async
  tasks, storage notes, async tasks.
- **[CHANGELOG](https://github.com/EvilFlowersCatalog/EvilFlowersCatalog/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)** —
  every release with feature, change, fix entries.

## Protocol & bindings

- **[evilflowers-protocol](https://github.com/EvilFlowersCatalog/evilflowers-protocol)** —
  canonical OpenAPI definition.
- **[evilflowers-protocol-python](https://github.com/EvilFlowersCatalog/evilflowers-protocol-python)** —
  Pydantic v2 bindings.

## Containers

- **GitHub Container Registry**:
  [`ghcr.io/evilflowerscatalog/evilflowerscatalog`](https://github.com/EvilFlowersCatalog/EvilFlowersCatalog/pkgs/container/evilflowerscatalog).

## Discussions, issues, contact

- **GitHub org**: [github.com/EvilFlowersCatalog](https://github.com/EvilFlowersCatalog)
- **Discussions**: [github.com/EvilFlowersCatalog/EvilFlowersCatalog/discussions](https://github.com/EvilFlowersCatalog/EvilFlowersCatalog/discussions)
- **Contact**: see [About](/about).

## Publications
